cases.title: TS-20: Mobile web check-in from iOS Safari or Android Chrome client marks Present without native app
preconditions: Active session with valid room GPS (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Enrolled Student authenticated with valid session cookie simulating mobile web client
Valid unexpired QrToken from GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current qrPayload wecheck://check-in?token=uuid&session=uuid
Student coordinates within radius (10.762700, 106.660200)
Request includes spoofMetadata.platform ios or android per mobile client
TestClock within attendance window (scheduledStart + 10 min)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId from QR payload, in-radius coordinates, and spoofMetadata.platform ios using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200, outcome Success, and attendance.status Present
Issue fresh Valid token for Android client assertion
POST /api/v1/check-in with spoofMetadata.platform android and assert HTTP 200 outcome Success
Verify no native-app-only headers or install tokens required in request or response
Query qr_tokens and assert each tokenId status Consumed
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 TS-20 satisfied on mobile web clients: functional check-in via QR token and GPS without native app install per NFR-18 target and AC-07a

cases.title: CheckInService.submit accepts mobile web locationPayload with platform metadata and commits Present in PostgreSQL
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database running via Compose
Active session with enrolled student Pending attendance and Valid qr_tokens row
CheckInService wired to AttendanceService, QrTokenRepository, and geo radius validator
locationPayload includes latitude, longitude, and spoofMetadata { mockLocationDetected: false, platform: "ios" } simulating mobile Safari client
steps: Record beforeState: attendance status Pending, qr_token status Valid
Invoke CheckInService.submit(tokenId, locationPayload, studentId) with in-radius mobile coordinates
Query attendance_records for sessionId and studentId and assert status Present with checkedInAt set
Query qr_tokens for tokenId and assert status Consumed
Query check_in_attempts and assert outcome Success with platform metadata captured if persisted
Assert raw latitude/longitude not stored in attendance_records per NFR-12
cases.expected: NFR-18 module boundary: mobile web GPS payload processed through full check-in pipeline; Present + Consumed atomically per FR-07 and FR-08 without native SDK

cases.title: Mobile check-in pipeline transitions Attendance Pending to Present after GPS radius pass
preconditions: Pending attendance_records row in PostgreSQL for enrolled studentId and Active sessionId
Valid qr_tokens row with status Valid linked to sessionId
Geo validator configured with session room point and 100 m radius
Mobile client coordinates within radius per testing-plan §11 geo fixtures
steps: Record beforeState Attendance Pending and QrToken Valid from database
Invoke CheckInService.submit with tokenId and mobile in-radius locationPayload (platform android)
Query attendance_records and assert afterState Present with non-null checkedInAt
Query qr_tokens and assert afterState Consumed
Verify GPS radius validation executed before Present commit per validation-rules §5.1
cases.expected: beforeState Pending/Valid; afterState Present/Consumed; NFR-18 GPS verification functional at integration layer per FR-08 on mobile web payload

cases.title: POST /api/v1/check-in from mobile web client returns HTTP 200 Success with Present attendance DTO
preconditions: API running on port 3001 against Compose PostgreSQL
Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie with mobile User-Agent (iPhone Safari or Android Chrome)
Active sessionId with Valid QrToken and student Pending attendance
Request body includes tokenId, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200, spoofMetadata.platform ios
steps: Send POST /api/v1/check-in with mobile client payload and Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 OK and Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body outcome Success and message Điểm danh thành công
Assert response body attendance object contains status Present and checkedInAt ISO 8601 UTC string
Assert no errorCode field on success envelope and no native-app redirect URL in response
cases.expected: HTTP 200 mobile web check-in contract per API design §6.2; structured success response consumable by iOS Safari and Android Chrome clients per NFR-18

cases.title: POST /api/v1/check-in with mobile GPS coordinates outside radius returns 400 OutOfRadius
preconditions: Active session with valid unexpired QrToken
Authenticated enrolled Student session simulating mobile Chrome client
Coordinates outside configured session radius prepared (outside 100 m fixture)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId, out-of-radius latitude/longitude, and spoofMetadata.platform android using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400 and outcome OutOfRadius
Assert localized Vietnamese message returned for mobile client display
Verify no Present attendance created for studentId and sessionId
cases.expected: NFR-18 GPS verification functional on mobile web: out-of-radius rejection surfaced via standard HTTP contract per FR-08 and AC-08b

cases.title: Flow A step 4: mobile web student completes check-in after QR poll in workshop lifecycle
preconditions: Flow A steps 1–3 complete: roster seeded, session opened Active, QR token polled via GET /sessions/:id/qr/current
Authenticated enrolled Student session established via mobile login with returnUrl preserving deep link
Student coordinates within session radius
tokenId extracted from qrPayload wecheck://check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId from Flow A step 3, in-radius coordinates, and spoofMetadata.platform android using Student session
Assert HTTP 200 outcome Success with attendance Present
Instructor GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and assert present count incremented by 1
Verify tokenId status Consumed in database
Confirm entire Flow A check-in step executable without native app middleware
cases.expected: NFR-18 end-to-end: Flow A happy-path mobile web check-in succeeds in workshop lifecycle per testing-plan §6 Flow A and MVP scope §7.3 mobile web only

cases.title: Instructor mobile browser denied POST /check-in with 403 — check-in restricted to Student role
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session with mobile Safari or Chrome User-Agent
Active session with valid QrToken and in-radius coordinates
Instructor role lacks checkin:submit permission per roles-permissions §2.2
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and coordinates using Instructor session cookie from mobile browser context
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Assert localized Vietnamese permission-denied message returned
Verify no Present attendance created for instructor userId
cases.expected: Mobile web platform does not bypass RBAC: only Student role may submit check-in per FR-07 actor specification on iOS/Android browsers

cases.title: Mobile check-in POST without GPS coordinates returns 400 GpsDisabled boundary
preconditions: Active session with valid unexpired QrToken
Authenticated enrolled Student session simulating mobile client
Request body omits latitude and longitude fields (GPS unavailable on device)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId only and spoofMetadata.platform ios using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400 and outcome GpsDisabled
Assert message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh per AC-08c
Verify no Present attendance created
cases.expected: NFR-18 GPS requirement enforced at API boundary: mobile clients without coordinates receive GpsDisabled per FR-08 documented error code

cases.title: iOS 15+ Safari: full mobile check-in journey via QR deep link and GPS without native app
preconditions: Playwright emulates iPhone 12+ with iOS 15+ Safari user-agent and viewport 375×812
Authenticated enrolled Student session on /check-in route
Active session with valid check-in deep link /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Browser geolocation permission granted with in-radius coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200)
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId on iOS Safari emulation
Verify CheckInFlow orchestrator loads consent → scanning/gps_capture → submitting → outcome states per ui-states §4.1
Grant geolocation via browser context and complete GPS capture step
Tap Xác nhận điểm danh submit control
Verify CheckInOutcomePanel success variant displays Điểm danh thành công with CTA Xong
Verify no App Store link, native app install banner, or unsupported-browser gate appears
Verify page renders without horizontal scroll at 375px width
cases.expected: NFR-18 iOS 15+ Safari target satisfied: functional QR token check-in and GPS on mobile web without native app install per 07-non-functional-risk §2.4

cases.title: Android 10+ Chrome: QR deep link check-in with GPS capture succeeds without native app
preconditions: Playwright emulates Android mid-range device with Chrome user-agent (Android 10+) and viewport 360×640
Authenticated enrolled Student session
Active session with valid token deep link wecheck://check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Geolocation mocked with in-radius coordinates and spoofMetadata.platform android
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId on Android Chrome emulation
Verify LocationConsentBanner visible on first visit per ui-states §4.1 consent step
Complete GpsCaptureStep: permission request → acquiring fix → submit per ui-states §4.2
Submit check-in and verify success panel Điểm danh thành công with Present status
Verify all primary UI labels in Vietnamese (vi-VN) per NFR-17
Verify no Google Play install prompt or native Android app requirement
cases.expected: NFR-18 Android 10+ Chrome target satisfied: functional QR and GPS check-in on mobile web per testing-plan §9 device matrix

cases.title: Mobile QR scanner: camera permission granted enables token extraction from scanned QR payload
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport 375×812 (iOS Safari or Android Chrome emulation)
Active session with instructor QR encoding wecheck://check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Camera permission grantable in test browser; QrScannerView component mounted
Test QR image or camera mock delivers valid deep link payload
steps: Navigate to /check-in on mobile viewport
Verify QrScannerView active in scanning step per ui-states §4.1
Grant camera permission and scan QR code or inject valid qrPayload
Verify client extracts tokenId and sessionId from wecheck://check-in deep link
Verify flow advances to gps_capture step with session context displayed
Complete GPS and submit; verify success outcome Present
cases.expected: NFR-18 QR scan functional on mobile web: browser camera API reads rotating QR token without native scanner SDK per FR-07 and ui-states §4

cases.title: Mobile GPS capture step acquires coordinates and submits check-in within 15 s client timeout
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport with valid token deep link to /check-in
Active session with room GPS and 100 m radius configured
Browser geolocation API returns in-radius coordinates within timeout budget
GpsCaptureStep substates per ui-states §4.2
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId and advance to gps_capture step
Verify requesting-permission substate displays Đang yêu cầu quyền định vị…
Grant location permission and verify acquiring-fix spinner with accuracy indicator
Verify coordinates captured and submit button enabled before 15 s timeout per AC-08c
Submit check-in and verify success outcome or documented rejection (OutOfRadius) with Vietnamese message
Verify submitting substate shows aria-busy overlay until API responds
cases.expected: NFR-18 GPS functional on mobile web: browser Geolocation API integration completes within documented 15 s timeout per FR-08 and ui-states §4.2

cases.title: Device matrix gate: check-in smoke passes on ≥ 4 reference devices before pilot
preconditions: Device matrix per testing-plan §9: iPhone 12+ iOS 15+ Safari, second iOS device, Android mid-range Android 10+ Chrome, second Android device
Each device on same LAN as staging API per 10-local-development-setup.md
Active session with valid QR displayed; enrolled student credentials per device
Check-in smoke script: login → deep link or scan → GPS grant → submit → verify Present
steps: Execute mobile check-in smoke on Device 1 (iPhone 12+ Safari) and record pass/fail with timestamp
Execute smoke on Device 2 (second iOS 15+ Safari device) and record pass/fail
Execute smoke on Device 3 (Android 10+ Chrome mid-range) and record pass/fail
Execute smoke on Device 4 (second Android 10+ Chrome device) and record pass/fail
Assert all 4 devices complete QR scan or deep link and GPS check-in with Present outcome
Document device model, OS version, browser version, and result in pilot readiness checklist
cases.expected: NFR-18 verification method satisfied: device matrix test on ≥ 4 physical devices before pilot per 07-non-functional-risk §2.4 and testing-plan §8 browser gate

cases.title: Student check-in usable at 320 px minimum width with touch targets ≥ 44×44 px
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport 320×568 (minimum supported width per production-ui-quality-bar §2)
Active session with valid token deep link to /check-in
Geolocation permission granted with in-radius coordinates
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId at 320px viewport width
Verify no horizontal scroll overflow on check-in page shell
Measure bounding box of primary submit button and scan/confirm controls
Assert each interactive touch target width and height ≥ 44 px per production-ui-quality-bar §2 and §4 Not acceptable
Complete check-in submit and verify success outcome panel visible without clipping
cases.expected: NFR-18 mobile UX bar: student check-in flow usable at 320 px width with accessible touch targets per production-ui-quality-bar §2 mobile check-in dimension

cases.title: Mobile QR deep link redirects unauthenticated student to login then returns to check-in flow
preconditions: Unauthenticated student opens scanned QR deep link on iOS Safari or Android Chrome mobile viewport
Active session with valid token in QR payload wecheck://check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Student account exists with valid credentials
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId without session cookie on mobile viewport
Verify redirect to /login with returnUrl preserving check-in query params
Complete login with valid student credentials on mobile form (touch-friendly controls)
Verify redirect back to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId with session established
Complete GPS capture and submit; verify Điểm danh thành công success confirmation
Verify entire auth-gated mobile journey completes without native app
cases.expected: NFR-18 mobile auth integration: QR scan deep link preserves context through mobile web login redirect per AC-02b and FR-07

cases.title: Mobile browser GPS permission denied shows GpsDisabled outcome with Vietnamese recovery guidance
preconditions: Authenticated Student on iOS Safari or Android Chrome mobile viewport
Active session with valid token deep link to /check-in
Browser geolocation permission denied or blocked in device settings
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId with geolocation permission denied
Verify GpsCaptureStep enters permission-denied substate per ui-states §4.2
Verify CheckInOutcomePanel or PermissionGuideModal displays GpsDisabled variant with CTA Hướng dẫn cấp quyền
Verify platform-specific Vietnamese instructions differ for Safari vs Chrome per NFR-19
Verify manual attendance fallback link visible per production-ui-quality-bar §3 and FR-11
Assert no Present attendance created server-side
cases.expected: NFR-18 GPS denial boundary on mobile web: functional degradation with Vietnamese recovery guidance; check-in blocked until GPS available per AC-08c

cases.title: Mobile check-in page rejects unsupported-browser gate without native app fallback requirement
preconditions: Application serves /check-in route with browser capability detection if implemented
Legacy or unsupported browser user-agent (e.g. IE11 or old WebView) available for negative test
Supported reference browsers iOS 15+ Safari and Android 10+ Chrome available as control
steps: Navigate to /check-in on iOS 15+ Safari emulation and verify check-in flow loads (control pass)
Navigate to /check-in on Android 10+ Chrome emulation and verify check-in flow loads (control pass)
Navigate to /check-in on unsupported browser user-agent if capability gate exists
Verify unsupported browser shows Vietnamese guidance to use Safari or Chrome without requiring native app install
Assert production-ui-quality-bar §4 Not acceptable violated if check-in requires native app install on any path
cases.expected: NFR-18 compatibility boundary: only iOS 15+ Safari and Android 10+ Chrome are supported targets; unsupported browsers get web guidance not native-app mandate per MVP scope §7.3

cases.title: Client tokenId parsed from mobile QR deep link resolves to Valid QrToken for CheckInService.submit
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session and Valid qr_tokens row
qrPayload string wecheck://check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId matches database tokenId
Enrolled studentId with Pending attendance
Deep link parser module extracts tokenId per API design §6.1
steps: Parse tokenId from qrPayload deep link format as mobile QrScannerView would
Invoke CheckInService.submit(parsedTokenId, mobile locationPayload, studentId) with in-radius coordinates
Assert CheckInResult outcome Success
Query qr_tokens where id equals parsedTokenId and assert status Consumed
Verify parsed sessionId matches Active session context
cases.expected: NFR-18 QR integration: mobile web client extracts token from scanned payload; parsed tokenId binds to one-time-use session token consumed on success per FR-07

cases.title: Android Chrome mobile check-in with mock-location flag surfaces SpoofSuspected outcome
preconditions: Playwright emulates Android 10+ Chrome with mobile viewport
Authenticated enrolled Student with valid token deep link
Check-in request includes spoofMetadata.mockLocationDetected true simulating fake-location app
Active session with valid QR token
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId on Android Chrome emulation
Submit check-in with mockLocationDetected true in client payload
Verify CheckInOutcomePanel SpoofSuspected danger variant with CTA Liên hệ giảng viên per ui-states §4.3
Verify no Present success confirmation displayed
Verify server returns outcome SpoofSuspected and no Present attendance persisted
cases.expected: NFR-18 Android device matrix includes mock location detection per testing-plan §9; mobile web anti-fraud functional on Android 10+ Chrome per FR-10

cases.title: Mobile check-in page interactive within 2 s on 4G profile per Lighthouse mobile gate
preconditions: Application deployed to staging reachable from mobile device or Playwright mobile emulation
Authenticated Student session with valid token deep link
Network throttling profile simulating 4G per production-ui-quality-bar §2 performance perception
Lighthouse mobile audit or equivalent timing harness on /check-in route
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId with 4G throttling enabled
Record time to interactive (TTI) or first meaningful paint for check-in shell
Verify primary submit and scan controls become interactive within 2000 ms
Verify no layout shift during QR countdown or GPS step transitions per ui-states §2 no layout shift rule
Complete successful check-in and verify confirmation within NFR-04 2 s SLA after submit
cases.expected: NFR-18 mobile performance perception: check-in screen interactive within 2 s on 4G per production-ui-quality-bar §2 tied to AC-07a confirmation SLA
